task_completion.description: Create a new forensic case in Autopsy with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing a case named 'Document_Triage_2024' and case number 'INV-DOC-001' in the title bar, case properties, or new case wizard.

task_completion.description: Add the specified ZIP archive as a data source to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing '/home/ga/evidence/govdocs/000.zip' in the data source tree or the add data source wizard.

task_completion.description: Run the required ingest modules for embedded file extraction, file type identification, and hash lookup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy ingest modules configuration screen or progress bar showing 'Embedded File Extraction', 'File Type Identification', and 'Hash Lookup' selected or running.

task_completion.description: Catalog the extracted images in a pipe-delimited CSV file with the correct header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/embedded_media.csv' with the header 'PARENT_DOCUMENT|EMBEDDED_FILENAME|MIME_TYPE|SIZE_BYTES|MD5_HASH' and pipe-delimited data rows.

task_completion.description: Write an investigative summary containing the case details and correct counts of documents and images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/embedded_summary.txt' showing the case name, data source, exactly 2 parent documents, and exactly 11 extracted images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Autopsy GUI to process the evidence rather than bypassing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy application open and being interacted with to process the ZIP file.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV contains actual extracted file metadata rather than placeholder or fabricated text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contents should show realistic MIME types (e.g., image/jpeg, image/png), byte sizes, and valid 32-character MD5 hashes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use an external script to extract images directly from the ZIP without using Autopsy.
integrity.visual_evidence: Autopsy interface should show the extracted embedded files in its tree view under the data source, confirming the tool was actually used for the extraction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected case name is 'Document_Triage_2024' and case number is 'INV-DOC-001'. The data source is '/home/ga/evidence/govdocs/000.zip'. The ground truth for the investigative summary is exactly 11 total extracted images across exactly 2 unique parent documents containing embedded media. The CSV must be at '/home/ga/Reports/embedded_media.csv' and the summary at '/home/ga/Reports/embedded_summary.txt'.
